channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Ashfield Lane pothole, 24th July
item.description:
Reported weeks ago, marked up but still not repaired. When will it be fixed please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashfield Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: VAS not fully funcy, 24th July
item.description:
When the VAS is triggered by speeding vehicles, the lights on the left hand sign do not illuminate so it is not fully functioning. Can it please be fixed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement sweep up of Crescent due to huge nos of parakeets eating the top of the trees. Who’s responsible for cleaning the pavements?, 24th July
item.description:
Street Cleansing - Sweeping Lat/Long - 51.4203401, 0.0073324 what3words - skinny.ended.craft Nearest address - 42 Alexandra Crescent, Bromley, BR1 4EU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction near fire exit - Bathtub, 24th July
item.description:
The Library fire exit has a bathtub placed next to it on the pavement. It is heavy and has been placed leaning upright against the wall in a precarious position.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith High Street, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flipping and graffiti, 24th July
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti removal, 24th July
item.description:
Back area needs a desperate clean. Full of graffiti in a section of block already attracting ASB

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untax motor home, 24th July
item.description:
Untax and no mot LM65 NVF van park in Iris Ave outside 40. There is 2 vans park in Iris Ave which both van have men living in each van, one is yellow and the other is black YJ20 HDV
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iris Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle, 24th July
item.description:
Vehicle is abandoned, no tax, parked on council land. vehicle is unsightly and needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stickers on a lamp post, case 26/01315/NSTFP, 24th July

item.title: Fly tip on pavement, 24th July
item.description:
Fly tip on pavement, including glass shelves.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leatherbottle Green, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Overhanging stinging nettles, 24th July
item.description:
Stinging nettles overhanging and reducing the pathway in Paddock Road. Previously reported and nothing has changed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Standard Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden post broken, 24th July
item.description:
There is a wooden post that has been knocked down by the bus stop outside Elizabeth Gardens on Long Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, Stifford Clays, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation at Heathfield Guest House, 24th July
item.description:
Shrub at front of property is not maintained and is, once again, obstructing the pathway especially at eye level
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17,19, Heathfield Road, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
